questionHtml:
Masses P and Q, are measured to be (30 ± 1) g and (20 ± 1) g respectively. Which of the following expressions gives the least percentage uncertainty?


A.  P + Q

B.  P − Q

C.  P × Q

D.  PQ

meta.title: Masses P and Q, are measured to be (30 ± 1) g and (20 ± 1) g respectively. Which of the following expressions gives the least percentage uncertainty? A. P + Q B. P − Q C. P × Q D.
